# Requirements Checklist: Full Account Setup for Invited Users

**Purpose**: Validate completeness, clarity, consistency, and coverage of requirements for the invite full-account-setup feature (spec.md).
**Created**: 2025-03-08
**Feature**: [spec.md](../spec.md)

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit.checklist` command based on feature context and requirements. **Implemented**: Spec was updated to satisfy all items (see spec.md for added detail on FR-001–FR-007, Key Entities, Success Criteria verification, Edge Cases, and User Story 3 acceptance 4).

## Requirement Completeness

- [x] CHK001 - Are all required fields for the full account setup page explicitly listed (first name, last name, password, confirm password, optional profile image)? [Completeness, Spec §User Story 1]
- [x] CHK002 - Is the mechanism for profile image capture specified (upload vs URL vs both)? [Gap, Spec §FR-001]
- [x] CHK003 - Are validation rules for first name and last name documented (e.g. min/max length, allowed characters)? [Gap, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK004 - Are requirements for “all places where user avatar is shown” enumerated or scoped (sidebar, header, profile, etc.)? [Completeness, Spec §FR-004, User Story 2]
- [x] CHK005 - Is the post-setup user journey explicitly specified (redirect to login vs auto-sign-in vs success-only message)? [Clarity, Spec §FR-006]

## Requirement Clarity

- [x] CHK006 - Is “existing policy” for password (e.g. minimum length) explicitly stated in the spec? [Clarity, Spec §FR-002]
- [x] CHK007 - Is the fallback when first name is missing defined unambiguously (first letter of email vs generic placeholder)? [Clarity, Spec §User Story 2 Acceptance 3, Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK008 - Are “clear validation messages” for API 400 responses specified or referenced? [Clarity, Spec §User Story 3 Acceptance 2]
- [x] CHK009 - Is “optional profile image (upload or URL as defined by implementation)” sufficient for requirements, or should the spec choose one approach? [Ambiguity, Spec §FR-001]

## Requirement Consistency

- [x] CHK010 - Do User Story 1 (full account page) and User Story 3 (API payload) align on required vs optional fields? [Consistency, Spec §User Story 1, §User Story 3]
- [x] CHK011 - Are avatar display requirements consistent between “no profile image” and “no first name” cases? [Consistency, Spec §FR-004, §FR-007]
- [x] CHK012 - Do Edge Cases (trim/empty name, image size/type, redirect) align with FR-001–FR-007? [Consistency]

## Acceptance Criteria Quality

- [x] CHK013 - Can “100% of valid-token cases” (SC-001) be verified from requirements alone? [Measurability, Spec §SC-001]
- [x] CHK014 - Are success criteria for “no broken or missing avatar” (SC-003) testable without implementation details? [Measurability, Spec §SC-003]
- [x] CHK015 - Is “existing invite and auth behavior is preserved or extended” (SC-004) defined in terms of observable behavior or contracts? [Measurability, Spec §SC-004]

## Scenario Coverage

- [x] CHK016 - Are requirements defined for the alternate flow when the user already has an account (e.g. same email)? [Coverage, Gap]
- [x] CHK017 - Are error/exception requirements specified for invite accept (network failure, duplicate key, etc.)? [Coverage, Spec §User Story 3]
- [x] CHK018 - Are requirements for “existing users without first/last name or photo” (FR-007) spelled out for sign-in and avatar display? [Coverage, Spec §FR-007]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [x] CHK019 - Are requirements for whitespace-only first/last name (trim and treat as empty) explicitly stated? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK020 - Are image size and file-type limits or validation rules specified for profile upload? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK021 - Is the “no session created after setup” case fully specified (redirect + message)? [Edge Case, Spec §Edge Cases]
- [x] CHK022 - Are requirements for legacy users with null firstName/lastName/profileImageUrl documented for avatar fallback? [Edge Case, Spec §FR-007]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [x] CHK023 - Is the assumption that `users` schema already has firstName, lastName, profileImageUrl documented or referenced? [Assumption, Spec §Key Entities]
- [x] CHK024 - Are dependencies on existing invite token validation and single-use semantics explicitly stated? [Dependency, Spec §FR-005]

## Notes

- Check items off as completed: `[x]`
- Add comments or findings inline
- Link to relevant spec sections (e.g. §FR-001) when resolving items
- Items are numbered sequentially for easy reference
